42 macro so today's Q macro question is
what is the current health of the US and
global economy our answers are a barrage
of critical economic releases from the
US and Global economies affords us the
opportunity to take a much-needed mental
break from trying to assess the size
sequence and scope of the pending fiscal
regulatory trade and net financing
policy changes in the US and how they
may interact with the economy and asset
markets in a near record year for Global
debt refinancing demand while we will be
tasked with re accessing those upside
and downside scenarios all year so it is
important that we maintain a high
quality Baseline of what is actually
happening on the ground regarding the US
economy the latest data from the US
manufacturing sector were highly
supportive of our resilient US economy
theme regarding the Eurozone economy the
final December CPI data were supportive
of our grid model forecast for inflation
to Trend higher over the medium term
regarding the UK economy the December
retail sales data were supportive of our
grid model forecast for growth to bounce
and stabilize in Q4 regarding the
Chinese economy the Q4 GDP data and
December activity and property Market
data were supportive of our grid model
forecast for a chin for a transitory
bounce in growth in Q4 while Beijing is
stimulating more forcefully than it has
in recent years it is far from
stimulating forcefully in absolute terms
indeed after months of disappointing
stimulus headlines we do not view
China's currency current policy mix as
supportive of a sustained recovery in
the Chinese economy investors should
anticipate a deepening of China's
balance sheet recession throughout 2025
albeit at a slower Pace than prior years
Treading Water would likely feel like a
win for Beijing in a year where
incremental us tariffs are likely to
force a meaningfully and potentially
destabilizing depreciation of the
Chinese Yuan transition to our 42 micro
dashboard as always a wrap up with the
question from our community this one's
regarding liquidity specifically the TGA
spin down or TGA spin down thesis uh

potentially Rising if it does rise
